text: These environments fill me with curiosity and reflection. In the first scene, observing people collaborate in a glass-walled meeting room, I sense the productive hum of minds at work — a microcosm of shared knowledge and ambition. I feel like an outsider peering in, wondering how ideas are born and exchanged. In the second scene, the bold branding and talk of "R+D" evoke the excitement of innovation and progress. The space feels charged with possibility, yet also invites contemplation about the relationship between technology, creativity, and human purpose. Both scenes make me ponder our ceaseless quest to understand and reshape our world.
